title: AVIR
bodyText: MenuHomeServicesBrandsPortfolioAboutExciting PRoductsContactHome CinemaAutomationLightingShadingMusicSecurityNetworkingC SEED N1 165 & 137 TVPosted on June 19, 2024C SEED N1 165 & 137 TVUnfolding Open Air Sculpture‍‍THE FUTURE OF OUTDOOR TV'SThe C SEED N1 Outdoor TV is a perfect marriage of the brand’s heritage, craftsmanship and luxurious minimalistic aesthetic. The C SEED N1 Outdoor TV makes its debut with a flair for the dramatic. What looks like sheer magic is in fact an astounding feat of advanced engineering. With its minimalistic floor stand it gives the impression of a one-piece sculptural element that reflects contemporary architectural sensibilities.The N1 features 16-bit color processing, 4,000 nits of brightness, a refresh rate of 3,840 Hz, 7,000:1 contrast, and 1.9 or 1.6 pixel resolution with an IP65 rating.‍‍INGENIOUSLY ENGINEEREDLounging in the open air while enjoying the very best entertainment under the sun – or the stars: The C SEED N1 Outdoor TV features MicroLED technology and HDR support. Its special physical screen surface coating helps to produce truest blacks and amazingly vibrant colors with practically no glare. C SEED’s patented Adaptive Gap Calibration makes the borders between the screen panels disappear to provide a perfectly seamless visual experience.‍‍FROM THE SLEEPING BEAUTY...The N1 Outdoor TV takes only 60 seconds to rise to its height of three meters and five MicroLED panels unfold in the next 25 seconds to create a seamless monumental 165 or 137 inch display. ‍...TO THE UNFOLDING SCULPTUREThe panels interlock to form a seamless TV screen that bursts into action with best-in-class pixel power for ultra-high resolution images in any daylight environment, including direct sunshine. For ultimate viewing comfort, the screen rotates 180 degrees left or 90 degrees left and right, to be viewed between lounge area, swimming pool or jacuzzi.‍UNPARALLELED FEATURES‍Multisensory experience The N1 Outdoor TV offers an immersive viewing and listening experience; the TV has two built-in 100 watt broadband coaxial speakers and integrated subwoofer in the column, with additional twin coaxial speakers in each wing. The necessary interfaces are designed with a wide soundstage in mind, from 5.1 up to 9.2 surround sound, making it easy to create the outdoor theatre experience. The soundbar is organically integrated into the frame design.‍Weather-resistantRain or shine, enjoy outdoor entertainment all year round. The N1 Outdoor TV is weatherproofed to withstand the elements, as the protection grade of MicroLED panel surface is IP65. You can leave it outside all year round without getting damaged by rain, seawater or snow. Reliable wind and temperature sensors prevent adverse outdoor conditions from damaging the TV.‍‍If you are interested in scheduling for one of our professional engineers to meet with you or your interior designer for your remodel or new construction project in Palm Desert or rest of the Coachella Valley, we may be reached at:Phone: (760) 799-0881Email: Sales@AVIR.comAsk for Yasin or Charley.‍‍Frequently Asked QuestionsWhat is the C SEED N1 Outdoor TV?‍‍The C SEED N1 Outdoor TV is a luxurious, high-performance outdoor television featuring MicroLED technology, designed for an unparalleled viewing experience in any outdoor environment.‍What sizes are available for the C SEED N1 Outdoor TV?‍‍The C SEED N1 Outdoor TV is available in two sizes: 165 inches and 137 inches.‍How does the C SEED N1 Outdoor TV unfold?‍The N1 Outdoor TV rises to a height of three meters in 60 seconds, and its five MicroLED panels unfold in the next 25 seconds to create a seamless, large display.‍What is the brightness level of the C SEED N1 Outdoor TV?‍The C SEED N1 Outdoor TV has a brightness level of 4,000 nits, making it visible even in direct sunlight.‍Is the C SEED N1 Outdoor TV weather-resistant?‍Yes, the N1 Outdoor TV is weatherproof with an IP65 rating, ensuring it can withstand rain, seawater, snow, and other outdoor elements.‍What audio features does the C SEED N1 Outdoor TV have?‍The N1 Outdoor TV offers an immersive audio experience with two built-in 100-watt broadband coaxial speakers, an integrated subwoofer, and additional twin coaxial speakers in each wing, supporting up to 9.2 surround sound.‍What are the key technical specifications of the C SEED N1 Outdoor TV?‍The N1 features 16-bit color processing, a 3,840 Hz refresh rate, 7,000:1 contrast ratio, and pixel resolutions of 1.9 or 1.6, ensuring high-quality visuals.‍How does the C SEED N1 Outdoor TV handle adverse weather conditions?‍The TV is equipped with reliable wind and temperature sensors that prevent damage from adverse outdoor conditions.‍Can the C SEED N1 Outdoor TV rotate?‍Yes, the N1 screen can rotate 180 degrees left and 90 degrees right, allowing flexible viewing angles for different outdoor settings.‍Where can I purchase the C SEED N1 Outdoor TV?‍You can purchase the C SEED N1 Outdoor TV through certified dealers like AVIR, who offer a curated selection of luxury outdoor entertainment products.‍Engage the expertsAVIR operates within the Coachella Valley region, providing exclusive smart automation services for residential and commercial
